Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Core focus on Target 16.3 (rule of law) by examining 'international and domestic climate litigation' (國際/國內氣候訴訟) and the development of legal frameworks ('法制架構').

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Focuses on international cooperation (Target 17.6) by analyzing the 'UNFCCC', 'Kyoto Protocol', and 'Paris Agreement', which are global partnerships for sustainable development.
